mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drone (name, model, serial_no, max_speed_kmh, flight_time_min, payload_kg, battery_mah, ai_score, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{model}, #{serialNo}, #{maxSpeedKmh}, #{flightTimeMin}, #{payloadKg}, #{batteryMah}, #{aiScore}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, model, serial_no, max_speed_kmh, flight_time_min, payload_kg, battery_mah, ai_score, created_at, updated_at FROM drone ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM drone
AND (name LIKE #{keywordLike} OR model LIKE #{keywordLike} OR serial_no LIKE #{keywordLike})
mapper.update: UPDATE drone SET name = #{name}, model = #{model}, serial_no = #{serialNo}, max_speed_kmh = #{maxSpeedKmh}, flight_time_min = #{flightTimeMin}, payload_kg = #{payloadKg}, battery_mah = #{batteryMah}, ai_score = #{aiScore}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
